name: medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month, billing discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Inaccurate billing due to mismatched patient records.
features: manual data entry for patient records
